originalRequest: Реализовать Omnigent-inspired пункты 1-9 на 100%, проверить каждый пункт, обеспечить Harness Engineering, changelog, commit, push, PR

criteria.requirement: Декларативный agent.yaml слой для PFO-ролей с role+harness+tools+sandbox+policies+terminals
criteria.sourceQuote: Декларативный agent.yaml слой для PFO-ролей с role+harness+tools+sandbox+policies+terminals
criteria.evidence: agents/*.yaml and docs/templates/PFO_AGENT_SPEC.yaml include executor harness/model, tools, policies, terminals, and sandbox fields; pfo agent-spec validate passed.
criteria.independentEvidence: python3 scripts/pfo.py agent-spec validate . --json returned PASSED with count 7 and no errors.

criteria.requirement: Policy engine с verdicts ALLOW/DENY/ASK на событиях type,target,data,actor,usage,session_state,result
criteria.sourceQuote: Policy engine с verdicts ALLOW/DENY/ASK на событиях type,target,data,actor,usage,session_state,result
criteria.evidence: pfo policy-eval returned ALLOW from a full event containing type,target,data,actor,usage,session_state,result.
criteria.independentEvidence: Policy-eval JSON output preserved actor codex, usage riskScore/estimatedCostUsd/toolCalls, session_state, and result.

criteria.requirement: Runner/server separation for future PFO Cloud/Team layer
criteria.sourceQuote: Runner/server separation for future PFO Cloud/Team layer
criteria.verification: runner/server artifacts and commands with local source of truth
criteria.evidence: pfo runner register and pfo server register wrote runner-host/control-plane contracts separating local execution from coordination server.
criteria.independentEvidence: .pfo/runner/runner-host.json and .pfo/server/control-plane.json were generated; control harness includes runner-server-separation.

criteria.verification: pfo dispatch --worktree creates isolated worktree metadata and cross-review flow
criteria.evidence: pfo dispatch --worktree created an independent git worktree and dispatch envelope.
criteria.independentEvidence: Dispatch output recorded worktree.status=created and path under /home/hihol/projects/.pfo-worktrees/product-factory-os.

criteria.verification: risk types require different harness/model/vendor when available
criteria.evidence: pfo cross-review with --risk security produced READY only with different harness/vendor reviewer.
criteria.independentEvidence: Cross-review output has criticalRisk=true, requireDifferentVendorForCriticalRisk=true, implementer vendor openai and reviewer vendor anthropic.

criteria.verification: riskScore estimatedCost modelTier budgetDecision downgradeAllowed in permission matrix/state/telemetry
criteria.evidence: pfo cost-route emitted riskScore, estimatedCost, modelTier, budgetDecision, downgradeAllowed and updated state telemetry.
criteria.independentEvidence: Cost-route output returned modelTier cheap, budgetDecision downgrade, downgradeAllowed true; permission matrices include telemetry fields.

criteria.verification: live panel exposes goal route unit command subagents inbox approvals gates diff verification
criteria.evidence: pfo session status/export live payload includes activeGoal, route, currentUnit, runningCommand, subagents, inbox, approvals, gates, diff, verification.
criteria.independentEvidence: Python wrapper checked all required live status fields and printed OK: live status fields present.

criteria.verification: pfo session export/import/attach/share with snapshot unit manifest event range artifacts
criteria.evidence: pfo session export/share/attach works with forkable packet containing unitManifest, eventRange, active artifacts and runtime state.
criteria.independentEvidence: session share wrote .pfo/session/session-share.json and session attach recorded OK from .pfo/session/session-export.json.

criteria.verification: sandbox.type read_paths write_paths allow_network env_passthrough in agent/unit specs
criteria.evidence: Agent specs and unit manifest templates include sandbox.type, read_paths, write_paths, allow_network, env_passthrough.
criteria.independentEvidence: validate_omnigent_runtime checks sandbox fields in agents, PFO_AGENT_SPEC, generated unit sandbox, and unit manifest templates.

criteria.requirement: Harness Engineering compliance, dated changelog, verification, commit, push, PR
criteria.sourceQuote: Harness Engineering compliance, dated changelog, verification, commit, push, PR
criteria.evidence: Harness Engineering mapping, dated changelog 1.2.2, stricter O1-O9 validator, and full production readiness are complete.
criteria.independentEvidence: python3 scripts/production_readiness.py passed; validate_control_harness validates 54 controls across quadrants; CHANGELOG has 1.2.2 dated 2026-06-21.
